docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PINKIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANNE ROBINSON--RISK MEMT REP.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, PINKIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
RETURN MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT,SENT TO PLAINTIFF
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC-LAWYERS INC. SVC.* FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PINKIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PINKIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
